final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card illustration for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed with labels on the side, and a cartoon narrative scene as the main visual body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, depicted through cartoon characters and scene
Scene/backdrop: must include the 赤壁 river battle setting rendered in cartoon style
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, engaging atmosphere suited for children — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact colors are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include title "赤壁之战" (large, prominent, at top); must include key story bullet points listed with numbered or labeled markers on the side panel (content: story highlights of 赤壁之战 in child-friendly Chinese)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title clearly visible; bullet-point key facts panel clearly separated from the main cartoon illustration
Avoid:
